---
name: Translation Request
about: Request a translation or report a translation issue
title: ''
labels: translation
assignees: ''

---

## Translation Request

**What language would you like to translate to?**

**What content needs translation?**
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] Website content
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Error messages
- [ ] UI text
- [ ] Comments
- [ ] User guides
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Is this a new translation or a correction to an existing one?**

**If it's a correction, what's the current translation and what should it be?**

**Target audience**
Who is this translation for?
- [ ] Users
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] End users
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Language details**
- Language name: [e.g. Portuguese, Spanish, French]
- Region/variant: [e.g. Brazilian Portuguese, European Portuguese]
- Writing direction: [e.g. Left-to-right, Right-to-left]

**Content priority**
- [ ] Critical (core functionality)
- [ ] High (important features)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (optional content)

**Translation approach**
- [ ] Machine translation + human review
- [ ] Human translation only
- [ ] Community contribution
- [ ] Professional translation
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the translation request here.

**Note**: If you can provide the translation yourself, please include it in your response!

**Note**: Translations help make the project accessible to more people worldwide!

**Note**: Consider cultural context and local preferences for better translations!

**Note**: Maintain consistency in terminology across translations!
